_doc: Per-image Gemini prompts for The Senior Specialist Persona Template. {palette} resolves at runtime.

cover.prompt:
Editorial book cover for a downloadable lead magnet PDF. Aspect: portrait, 3:4, US letter book cover proportions.

CRITICAL TEXT-RENDERING RULES:
1. The image must contain ONLY the text pieces listed under TEXT TO RENDER below. No other text. No font names. No instructions. No labels beyond what is listed.
2. Never render the words 'Inter', 'Inter Regular', 'Inter Display Bold', 'JetBrains Mono', 'sans serif', or any typography or font instruction inside the image.
3. Spell every rendered word exactly as written, character for character.
4. The silhouette must be a pure shape with NO facial features, NO eyes, NO mouth, NO hair detail. It is an anonymous head-and-shoulders outline filled with a soft gradient or flat tone.
5. The credential badges must contain ONLY the icon described, no text labels, no letters, no numbers inside the badges.

TEXT TO RENDER (exactly these pieces, nothing more):
A. Top-left small pill, uppercase, two words: FREE PLAYBOOK
B. Upper-third headline across two lines: line 1 reads 'The Senior Specialist', line 2 reads 'Persona Template'.
C. Subtitle inside a horizontal off-white translucent panel directly below the headline, one short line: The 7-component fillable schema. 4 background templates. 10 mandatory guardrails. 5 worked personas.
D. Bottom-left small wordmark: AI BrandFactory

CENTRAL VISUAL (this is the hero of the cover, fills the lower 60 percent of the cover):
A stylized portrait silhouette of a head and shoulders, anonymous, no facial features. The silhouette is the central focal point, positioned in the center-lower portion of the cover, dominating the lower 60 percent vertically.

The silhouette specification:
- Shape: a clean head-and-shoulders outline as if a portrait photographed from the front. Round head, neck, shoulders that taper outward. Centered horizontally.
- Fill: a soft cyan-to-purple gradient inside the silhouette outline (bright cyan #06B6D4 at the top of the head fading to electric purple #7C3AED at the shoulders), with the silhouette outline itself a thin off-white #FAF9FF stroke.
- NO facial features. NO eyes, no mouth, no nose, no ears visible, no hair detail. The silhouette is a pure shape, anonymous.
- A subtle bright cyan #06B6D4 glow ring around the outer edge of the silhouette suggesting the persona is 'activated' and present.

FLOATING CREDENTIAL BADGES around the silhouette:
- 4 small rounded chip-shaped badges floating in the negative space around the silhouette (positioned roughly at the 10 o'clock, 2 o'clock, 8 o'clock, and 4 o'clock positions relative to the silhouette's head-and-shoulders shape).
- Each badge is a rounded rectangle, about 1/8 the height of the cover.
- Each badge fill: dark indigo #1A0B4B with a thin off-white #FAF9FF outline stroke, no fill texture, flat clean design.
- Inside each badge, a single line-art icon, off-white outline only, about 60 percent of the badge's interior height. The 4 icons across the 4 badges are:
  1. Top-left badge (10 o'clock): a stylized briefcase outline (suggests business / consulting)
  2. Top-right badge (2 o'clock): a stylized stethoscope outline (suggests healthcare specialism)
  3. Bottom-left badge (8 o'clock): a stylized scale of justice outline (suggests legal specialism)
  4. Bottom-right badge (4 o'clock): a stylized code-bracket symbol < / > (suggests technical specialism)
- All 4 icons are PURE LINE ART. No fill, no realistic illustration, no photographic detail. Off-white outlines on indigo badge background.
- Each badge has a thin bright cyan #06B6D4 connecting line linking it visually to the silhouette, suggesting the persona could be filled with any of these specialism slots.
- NO text labels on the badges. NO letters, no numbers, no words inside the badges.

TYPOGRAPHY:
- Cover headline lines 1 and 2: large bold sans-serif display face, off-white #FAF9FF, tight letter spacing.
- Subtitle panel: clean medium-weight sans-serif, slate #1E293B inside the off-white panel.
- Top-left pill: condensed mono-spaced face, bright cyan #06B6D4.
- Wordmark: clean light-weight sans-serif, off-white.

Design language:
- Premium editorial cover with the anonymous silhouette as the topic-specific centerpiece, telegraphing 'persona template' (the silhouette is a placeholder you fill, the badges are the specialism slots).
- Background: deep indigo #1A0B4B to electric purple #7C3AED diagonal gradient at 135 degrees, subtle bright cyan bloom upper right.
- Layout: pill + headline + subtitle panel in upper third, the silhouette + badges composition dominates the lower 60 percent, wordmark anchored bottom-left.
- Subtle paper grain texture across the whole frame.
- Echoes the system-illustration approach of P09 Multi-Agent Playbook (a topic-specific central composition that telegraphs the playbook content), with an anonymous silhouette and floating specialism badges replacing the hexagon network.

Color palette: {palette}.

What to avoid:
- No diagonal cyan accent line crossing the frame.
- No grid of small text pills (no WHAT IS INSIDE row).
- No funnel composition (that was P38, do not reuse).
- No concentric rings composition (that was P37, do not reuse).
- No horizontal stacked-bars composition (that was P36).
- No vintage ad mockups or fanned card stack composition (that was P39, do not reuse).
- No location pins or map composition (that was P40, do not reuse).
- No browser window or app screen composition (that was P42, do not reuse).
- No soundwave or transcription waveform composition (that was P49, do not reuse).
- No 5-layer or stacked-tiers composition (that was P50, do not reuse).
- No flow / arrow / pipeline composition.
- No realistic faces. No photographic portraits. No realistic illustrations of people. No avatars with eyes or mouths.
- No realistic illustrations of doctors, lawyers, businesspeople, or any specific specialist role.
- No emoji icons.
- No realistic clip art, no realistic illustrations of laptops, phones, screens, or apps.
- No literal brand logos. No AI tool brand logos (no OpenAI logo, no Claude logo, no Gemini logo).
- No text labels or letters inside the credential badges.
- No facial features of any kind on the silhouette.

Output: a single high-quality cover image, print-ready, 4K.

hero.prompt:
Wide hero banner for a squeeze page giving away 'The Senior Specialist Persona Template'. Aspect: 16:9.

CRITICAL TEXT-RENDERING RULES:
- NO rendered text anywhere in the image.
- No font names or typography labels.
- No letters or text labels inside the credential badges.
- The silhouette has NO facial features.

Composition: a 3D-rendered isometric mockup of a US-letter PDF cover floating on the right third, soft drop shadow on a textured editorial background. The PDF cover shows the same silhouette + credential badges composition from the cover design.

On the left two-thirds: an abstract version of the silhouette + badges motif rendered at low opacity. A soft anonymous head-and-shoulders silhouette in the center-left area, rendered with a thin off-white #FAF9FF outline at about 60 percent opacity, filled with a faint cyan-to-purple gradient. NO facial features on the silhouette.

Around the abstract silhouette, 3 to 4 small rounded credential badges floating in the negative space, each containing a single line-art icon (stylized briefcase, stylized stethoscope, stylized scale of justice, stylized code-bracket symbol) in off-white line art. Each badge has a thin bright cyan #06B6D4 connecting line linking it to the silhouette, low opacity. The badges themselves are dark indigo #1A0B4B with thin off-white outlines. NO text labels inside any badge.

A subtle bright cyan #06B6D4 glow ring around the silhouette's outer edge, low opacity.

Background:
- Top half: deep indigo #1A0B4B fading to electric purple #7C3AED.
- Bottom half: off-white #FAF9FF with faint mesh gradient bloom.
- PDF mockup on the dividing line.
- Subtle paper grain.

Style:
- Premium editorial, restrained.
- No realistic faces, no photographic portraits, no realistic illustrations of people, no avatars with facial features.
- No brand logos, no AI tool logos.
- The silhouette + badges motif is the recurring element, rendered subtly so the PDF mockup remains the focal point.
- No diagonal cyan accent line. No funnel. No concentric rings. No vintage ad mockup card stack. No location pins. No browser window. No soundwave. No 5-layer stacked tiers.

Color palette: {palette}.

Output: a single 4K hero image.

og.prompt:
Open Graph social share card image, 1.91:1 widescreen.

CRITICAL TEXT-RENDERING RULES:
1. Contains ONLY the text pieces listed below.
2. No font names or typography instructions.
3. Spell every word exactly as written.
4. NO text labels, letters, or numbers inside the credential badges on the right side.
5. The silhouette on the right has NO facial features of any kind.

TEXT TO RENDER:
A. Top-left small pill, uppercase: AI BRANDFACTORY
B. Centered-left massive headline two lines: line 1 reads 'The Senior Specialist', line 2 reads 'Persona Template'. Line 2 should be smaller than line 1.
C. Below headline, off-white rounded subtitle pill, one line: The 7-component fillable schema, 10 guardrail patterns, 4 communication archetypes, and 5 worked personas
D. Below subtitle pill, horizontal text strip with middle-dot separators: Background · Years and Era · Skills · How They Think · Communication Style · Guardrails · Output Format
E. Bottom-right small label, faded: files.aibrandfactory.com

TYPOGRAPHY:
- Top-left pill: condensed mono-spaced, bright cyan #06B6D4.
- Headline line 1: massive bold sans-serif, off-white #FAF9FF.
- Headline line 2: smaller medium-weight sans-serif, off-white at 80% opacity.
- Subtitle: clean medium-weight sans-serif, slate #1E293B inside pill.
- Components strip: clean medium-weight sans-serif, bright cyan #06B6D4, smaller size.
- Bottom-right label: clean sans-serif, off-white 70%.

Background: deep indigo to electric purple diagonal gradient at 135 degrees. On the right third, an abstract version of the silhouette + credential badges motif: a stylized anonymous head-and-shoulders silhouette in the right-third area, off-white #FAF9FF outline filled with a faint cyan-to-purple gradient, NO facial features. Around the silhouette, 3 small rounded credential badges with line-art icons inside (stylized briefcase, stylized stethoscope, stylized scale of justice) in off-white. Each badge has a thin bright cyan #06B6D4 connecting line to the silhouette. NO text inside any badge. A subtle bright cyan glow ring around the silhouette's outer edge.

What to avoid:
- No realistic faces, no photographic portraits, no realistic illustrations of people, no avatars with eyes or mouths.
- No brand logos, no AI tool logos (no OpenAI, no Claude, no Gemini logos).
- No emoji.
- No additional text beyond the pieces listed.
- No text labels inside the credential badges.
- No reuse of the diagonal cyan accent line motif. No funnel composition (P38). No vintage ad mockup card stack (P39). No concentric rings (P37). No location pins (P40). No browser window (P42). No soundwave (P49). No 5-layer stacked tiers (P50).

Color palette: {palette}.

Output: sharp, ready as og:image.

notion-cover.prompt:
Wide editorial banner for a Notion page header. Aspect 21:9.

CRITICAL CONSTRAINT: NO title, NO headline, NO wordmark, NO logo, NO labels in the corners. NO legible English words anywhere in the image. NO text labels, letters, or numbers inside any of the credential badges. NO facial features of any kind on any of the silhouettes.

Composition:
- Background: deep indigo #1A0B4B on the left fading to electric purple #7C3AED on the right, subtle bright cyan #06B6D4 bloom upper right.
- Across the full frame edge-to-edge, distributed across the banner: 3 anonymous head-and-shoulders silhouettes (one in the left third, one in the center, one in the right third). Each silhouette is rendered with a thin off-white #FAF9FF outline, filled with a soft cyan-to-purple gradient. NO facial features on any silhouette. Each silhouette is about 70 percent of the banner's vertical height.
- Around each silhouette, 3 to 4 small rounded credential badges floating in the negative space. Each badge is a small rounded rectangle, dark indigo #1A0B4B with thin off-white outline, containing a single line-art icon in off-white (stylized briefcase, stylized stethoscope, stylized scale of justice, stylized code-bracket symbol, stylized chart-line symbol, stylized lightbulb-outline). The icons rotate across the silhouettes so the same icons are not always next to the same silhouette.
- Each badge has a thin bright cyan #06B6D4 connecting line linking it to its silhouette, low opacity.
- A subtle bright cyan glow ring around each silhouette's outer edge, telegraphing 'activated personas.'
- Subtle paper grain across the entire banner.

What to avoid:
- No corner text. No wordmark. No logos.
- No brand logos of any kind. No AI tool logos.
- No legible English text or labels anywhere.
- No text inside the credential badges.
- No realistic faces, no photographic portraits, no realistic illustrations of people, no avatars with eyes or mouths or hair detail.
- No emoji, no clip art, no realistic icons of doctors, lawyers, or businesspeople.
- No diagonal accent line crossing the frame.
- No padlock or shield icons.
- No funnel composition (P38). No concentric rings composition (P37). No vintage ad mockup card stack (P39). No location pins (P40). No browser window (P42). No soundwave (P49). No 5-layer stacked tiers (P50).

Color palette: {palette}.

Output: a single high-quality 4K cinematic banner.
